series_metadata.series_title: Phone calls and voice messages placed to the Ohio Electronic Funds Transfer System
series_metadata.series_description: Recordings of conversations between taxpayers and operators or the voicemail account at the Ohio Electronic Funds Transfer System telephone number. Also includes log of recorded calls. Recordings are retrievable if requestor provides date and approximate time of call, phone number that call was placed from, whether caller spoke with an operator or left a message, and if applicable, the name of the operator with whom the caller spoke.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: one year from date of recording
